questionHtml:
What are the strongest intermolecular forces between molecules of propanone, CH3COCH3, in the liquid phase?

A.     London (dispersion) forces

B.     Covalent bonding

C.     Hydrogen bonding

D.     Dipole–dipole forces

meta.title: What are the strongest intermolecular forces between molecules of propanone, CH3COCH3, in the liquid phase? A. London (dispersion) forces B. Covalent bonding C. Hydrogen bonding D.
